name: Qualified Replacement Plan Excise Tax Reduction

eligibility.description: Employer must establish or maintain a qualified replacement plan where at least 95% of active participants from the terminated plan remain as employees and receive a direct transfer of assets.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Reduces the excise tax on the reversion of qualified plan assets from 50% to 20% if the employer transfers at least 25% of the maximum reversion amount to a qualified replacement plan.
